channel.title: Posts on Qian Jia
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Qian Jia

item.title: Build a Personal Website with Github Pages and Github Actions
item.description: GitHub Pages is a powerful tool for building and hosting static websites, while GitHub Actions allow you to automate your workflows.

item.title: Rich Content
item.description: Hugo ships with several Built-in Shortcodes for rich content, along with a Privacy Config and a set of Simple Shortcodes that enable static and no-JS versions of various social media embeds.
